title: After the Japanese Derby: Positive Words

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Mihono Bourbon dominates all 2,400
meters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Pant, huff, wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Well, that didn't go so well...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Sniff! I couldn't do it. I still couldn't keep up!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I haven't changed at all!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That's not true.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You've gotten much better since the Satsuki Sho.
I've been watching you and I've certainly felt your
improvement.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: All the same, I'm going to win the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon, you really mean it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowd goes wild at their conversation.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
So Rice Shower has been chasing Bourbon all this
time? They both had a great race!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is going to be a long-distance
showdown! I can't wait to see how Rice Shower
does!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All eyes in Tokyo Racecourse are on the winner,
Mihono Bourbon, and her unlikely rival, Rice
Shower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Matikanetannhauser, on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aghhh, that was sooo close.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: No. You know what? I'm really frustrated!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is always going for gold, but
she was exceptionally motivated for her
once-in-a-lifetime chance at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I mean, there's nothing special about me at all!
I'm ordinary! I'm nobody!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But... even if that's true... I still care about
winning.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm the same as everyone else. If it's not first
place, I don't need it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I admire her passion, but in reality, you can't
expect things to always go your way.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
This was a race I'll never get another chance at,
so I wanted to win it sooo badly.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And that's... that's exactly why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser hangs her head and clenches
her fists, shoulders shaking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if awaiting impending tears, the cameras focus
in on her, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing is what is next!
Whatever it is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her head snaps back up, and she's wearing that
same bright expression everyone knows so well.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've still got next time! That's why I'm gonna learn
from my mistakes and train as hard as I can!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Did you see Matikanetannhauser's press
conference?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I did! I lost today too, but it made me feel
better.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. When she was all like, "whatever it is!"—I
really felt that! I wanna be able to say things like
that too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Eek, how embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser's optimism and cheerful
words touch the hearts of many.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Kikuka Sho. As always, we're
aiming to win.
